value_chain_position: Designs, manufactures, and sells the da Vinci robotic surgery platform; earns upfront system revenue plus high-margin consumable instruments and service contracts per procedure.
relative_comps: Intuitive Surgical is the canonical chokepoint in surgical robotics — it owns ~80% of installed robotic surgery globally, and its consumable blade creates a per-procedure toll on every da Vinci case. Revenue CAGR of 17.4% and 21.4% YoY growth at $10.6B scale is exceptional; FCF margin of 27% is best-in-class. Medtronic's Hugo is the only credible near-term competitor, but Hugo is years behind in installed base and procedure training. ISRG is transitioning to da Vinci 5 (with improved force feedback and multi-quadrant capability), widening the technology gap. Load-bearing score of 5 — no route around ISRG for hospitals seeking a proven robotic surgery platform.
